base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of projectile_arrow_4dir — a projectile from 1986 legend of zelda. Bow-and-arrow projectile — 4-dir static arrow graphic. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Bow-and-arrow projectile — 4-dir static arrow graphic; travels from Link toward target
